title: OBSIDIAN DROP: Fit guide and stacking rules
excerpt: How to build a monochrome fit that looks expensive: proportions, hardware placement, and clean layering.

sections.heading: Proportions first
sections.body: Start with one oversized piece (tee or hoodie) and keep the rest clean. Streetwear reads premium when the silhouette is intentional, not accidental.

sections.heading: Hardware placement
sections.body: Chains should sit at the collar line or just below the sternum. Avoid mid-chest clutter; clean negative space makes the shine look expensive.

sections.heading: Layering rules
sections.body: If you stack chains, keep the lengths separated by at least 2 inches so they don’t tangle and so each layer photographs cleanly.

cta.heading: Build the fit with OBSIDIAN pieces.
cta.body: Shop the drop and add a chain stack or signet to lock the look.
